description_long: This is a single-story house with a light blue exterior and white trim, featuring a prominent gable roof covered in light gray shingles. The front facade includes a wide porch with decorative railings and multiple large windows with white framing and yellow curtains, creating a welcoming appearance. The rear side of the house is simpler, with a small high window and no porch. Both sides of the house have symmetrical window arrangements, enhancing the balanced look. The structure appears to be primarily constructed from wood, with glass windows and a shingled roof. The overall design suggests a cozy, suburban residential home with classic American architectural influences.
description: A light blue, single-story house with a gable roof, wide front porch, and large symmetrical windows with white trim and yellow curtains.
description_view_0: Side view showing two large windows with white trim and yellow curtains, and part of the front porch railing.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a simple wall with horizontal siding and a small rectangular window near the roof peak.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with two large windows and a partial view of the porch railing.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the wide porch, central entry door with glass panels, and large symmetrical windows flanking the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass-paneled door with a wide porch, decorative railings, and steps leading up to the entry.
